song.title: He’s Praying For You
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C Dm7 He understands you thoroughly. . G7 C There’s nothing He does not know. . Dm7 All your problems and weaknesses, . G C C7 Don’t say it isn’t so!||
.F G He’s your helper, sympathizing. .C Am He’s the Spirit. Don’t neglect Him. . Dm7 G7 C He’s praying for you and sustaining you.
[V2] He gives support and comforts you, Interceding night and day. And when you’re weak He groans for you With words you cannot say.||
He’s the Spirit, interceding. He’s the Spirit. Don’t neglect this Wonderful One who is praying for you.
[V3] So many times we are so weak, But someone deep within Supplies the very help we need, And we’re upheld by Him.||
He says, “Don’t be disappointed.” He knows all your fears and failures. He’s praying for you as no one else can do.
